description: Apartment shell variant, Plan 1 hand-tuned single-clip demo. Two dogs (golden bark + husky piano) in apartment_0000 living room. Subset-furniture mode (core + decoration; misc excluded). 5-second clip, 15 fps, 75 frames. Mic + camera glued at same 6DoF; camera FOV 90 deg.

coordinate_frame.system: right-handed Y-up (meters). Origin = APARTMENT_MIC_ORIGIN_UE_CM converted to SSOT (see tools/spike_rlr/gen_mesh_apartment.py::ue_to_ssot).
coordinate_frame.notes: UE side loads apartment_0000 map (which has its own arbitrary origin). SPEAR conversion handled by tools/gpurir_scenes/run_render_pass.py::_world_from_scene (room='apartment'). Habitat/RLR side ingests SSOT + apartment_shell_map.json + apartment_v1_mesh.glb.

mic.notes: yaw=0 world -> yaw=0 UE (facing +X UE); mic-forward = +X world (SSOT). Sofa is at world +X from mic, so camera looks at sofa.

sources.notes: Golden walks along -Y to +Y at X=-2.5 (behind mic in the dining/kitchen room). Provides a rear audio cue; visually out of front-camera FOV. Planner inserts small detour if needed.

Husky walks from (0.5,-1.0) to (1.5,0.3) — a diagonal in the small free-space corridor directly in front of the camera. ~50% of frames land inside the +X 90-deg FOV cone; the rest give audio-only cues from the side. Planner (A*+Chaikin) curves around the sofa (X>=1.87) and any inflated obstacles automatically.
